meta.title: SPORFORMATION — Internal workspace
meta.description: Private space for leadership and faculty.

common.comingSoon: Wire to your Supabase project and env vars to enable these flows.
common.commandMenuPlaceholder: Search for a page or action…

auth.title: Secure sign-in
auth.subtitle: SPORFORMATION intranet
auth.invitationNote: Teachers, students and pedagogy accounts created by leadership without a chosen password must use « First-time sign-in » with the email you were given, then sign in from the « Password » tab.
auth.errorConfig: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please contact your school administrator.
auth.errorBadUrl: The sign-in service is unreachable right now. Check your internet connection, try again later or contact your school administrator.
auth.errorNeedProfile: Your account is not recognised for this school. If you’re activating access for the first time, use « First-time sign-in » with the email supplied by leadership, then sign in from the « Password » tab using the same address. If this keeps happening, contact your school administrator.
auth.errorGeneric: Sign-in failed. Try again or contact your school administrator.

errors.EMAIL_NOT_CONFIRMED: Your email address still needs to be confirmed — check your inbox and spam folder. If you didn’t receive anything, contact your school administrator.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts in a short time. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: This account cannot sign in right now. Contact your school administrator.
errors.CONFIG: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please contact your school administrator.
errors.BAD_URL: The sign-in service is unreachable. Try again later or contact your school administrator.
errors.GENERIC: Sign-in failed. Try again or contact your school administrator.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.INVITE_REQUIRED: This address cannot register here. It must match a record created by leadership (pending teacher invite or student row with email and no activated account yet).
errors.INVITE_AMBIGUOUS: Multiple student records share this email without an activated account. Ask leadership to fix duplicates.
errors.INVITE_INVALID: This invitation cannot be used. Contact leadership.
errors.ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account already exists with this email. Use the « Password » tab.
errors.PEDAGO_PASSWORD_SETUP_FAILED: Could not save your password. Try again or contact leadership.
errors.PROFILE_UPDATE_FAILED: Your password may have been applied, but the profile could not be updated. Contact leadership.
errors.AUTH_CREATE_FAILED: Could not finish creating the account. Try again or contact an administrator.
errors.PROFILE_CREATE_FAILED: Could not save the profile. Contact an administrator.
errors.STUDENT_LINK_FAILED: Could not link your account to the student record. Try again or contact leadership.
errors.SIGNIN_AFTER_SIGNUP_FAILED: Account created, but automatic sign-in failed. Use the « Password » tab.

signup.hint: If leadership prepared your account (invited teacher, student record, or pedagogy user): use the same email as on your record and choose your first password (minimum 8 characters).
signup.submit: Activate my access and sign me in

firstPassword.title: Set your password
firstPassword.description: Your account was created by leadership. Choose a password to continue — this step is required.

teacherDocuments.title: Documents to provide
teacherDocuments.intro: Upload the files requested by the school administration. When every item is complete, send your bundle for validation.
teacherDocuments.noRequests: No documents are required for your account. If this seems wrong, contact the administration.
teacherDocuments.fileLabel: File (PDF, image or Office — max 50 MB)
teacherDocuments.submitSuccess: Your bundle has been sent to the administration.
teacherDocuments.submittedWaiting: Your bundle has been submitted. The administration will review it.
teacherDocuments.loadError: Could not load the requested documents.

dashboard.subtitleAdministrator: School-wide oversight and daily admin tools.
dashboard.subtitleTeacher: Announcements, agenda and students in one click.
dashboard.subtitleStudent: Shared documents, messages and school announcements.
dashboard.recentSanctionsHint: Latest discipline entries you’re allowed to see.
dashboard.principalClassesHint: Classes where you are the homeroom teacher.
dashboard.principalClassesEmpty: No homeroom class is assigned to your account yet.
dashboard.otherTeachingClassesHint: Classes where you teach without homeroom duties.
dashboard.teacherScopedClassesHint: Cloud documents and students within your scope.
dashboard.studentNoClassAssignHint: Your account isn’t linked to a class yet.
dashboard.announcementsHeroHint: Urgent items are highlighted. Audience-targeted posts only appear for matching roles.
dashboard.messagingUnreadSummary: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}
dashboard.sanctionsEmpty: No recent sanctions in your scope.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Only announcements that are currently published (the live bulletin). There are no drafts here—anything listed stays visible until deleted.
announcements.readOnlyHint: You can see every announcement here, regardless of its dashboard audience. Publishing, editing, and deleting are limited to leadership and administrators.
announcements.empty: No announcements aimed at your role right now.
announcements.emptyHint: Announcements with a narrow audience (e.g. leadership only or head teachers only) only show for matching roles. Pick “whole staff” to reach every teacher account.
announcements.bulletinEmpty: No announcements have been published yet.
announcements.bulletinEmptyHintManage: Use “Publish an announcement” to add one.
announcements.bulletinEmptyHintRead: Check back later—new items appear here as soon as they are published.

manage.publishDialogDesc: Write the message, pick its audience on the dashboard, and choose its look. It will appear on this page for everyone and on matching users’ dashboards.
manage.editDialogDesc: Changes take effect immediately after you save.
manage.deleteDescription: It will disappear for everyone. This cannot be undone.
manage.forbiddenToast: You are not allowed to do that.
manage.serviceToast: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
manage.goneToast: This announcement no longer exists or was removed.

cloud.title: Cloud
cloud.subtitle: By class, teacher, student, or all documents.
cloud.studentNoClassMessage: Your account isn’t assigned to a class yet, so documents aren’t available.
cloud.studentSubfolderHint: Students can upload here and into nested folders under this branch.
cloud.explorerMyTeacherDocsHint: Files provided for your onboarding record (you or the administration).
cloud.explorerMyTeacherDocsEmpty: No onboarding documents on file yet.
cloud.explorerMyTeacherDocsDirectorHint: Onboarding files submitted by teachers (new hires).
cloud.explorerSearchHint: Browse by class, teacher, or student, or open all documents (search, sorting, and layout).
cloud.explorerAllDocsEmpty: No documents in the Cloud yet.
cloud.explorerDocCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 documents} one {1 document} other {# documents}}
cloud.dropzone: Drag & drop here or click to browse
cloud.onlyDirectorDeletes: Only the director can delete files.
cloud.maxSize: Max 50 MB — PDF, Office, images only
cloud.folderLeadershipBlurb: Content added by the director or administration.
cloud.folderStudentDepositSubtitle: Documents uploaded by this student or shared with them in the Cloud (student folder root).
cloud.classFolderAudienceGroupLabel: Which kinds of documents to show?
cloud.classFolderAudienceFilterHintStudents: Filters the file list below. Folders stay visible so you can open them.
cloud.classFolderAudienceFilterHintAdmin: Filters the file list below. Folders stay visible so you can open them.
cloud.classFolderAudienceNoMatchingFiles: No matching documents in this folder.
cloud.uploadDialogAriaSummary: Cloud upload: file up to 50 MB, then class, visibility, name, and version. Student is optional.
cloud.uploadDialogAriaSummaryStudent: Student upload: file up to 50 MB, folder under Student documents, document title and version number.
cloud.uploadPlacementSubtitle: Leave at class root or pick a subfolder.
cloud.uploadPlacementSubtitleStudent: Pick the folder meant for student uploads.
cloud.classFolderStudentVisibilityStaffHint: Students only see the “Student documents” folder and its subfolders—put files meant for them there. Other folders stay staff-only.
cloud.uploadClassRequiredStaff: Every document must be linked to a class.
cloud.uploadNoClassAvailable: No class is available in your scope — you cannot upload.
cloud.uploadError_UNAUTH: Session expired. Please sign in again.
cloud.uploadError_INVALID_VERSION: Version must be a whole number ≥ 1.
cloud.uploadError_INVALID_AUDIENCE: Choose who the document is for (students, administration only, or both).
cloud.uploadError_STUDENT_CLASS_MISMATCH: The selected student is not in the chosen class.
cloud.uploadError_STUDENT_CLOUD_FORBIDDEN: You can’t upload here with this account.
cloud.uploadError_STUDENT_FOLDER_REQUIRED: Choose a folder under Student documents.
cloud.editDocumentAria: Edit document name, description, class, or student
cloud.editDialogDescription: The downloadable file stays the same; Cloud metadata (including audience) is updated.
cloud.editError_UNAUTH: Session expired. Please sign in again.
cloud.editError_FORBIDDEN: You can only edit documents you uploaded. The director can edit all documents.
cloud.editError_MISSING_FIELDS: Please provide at least a title.
cloud.studentSubfolderError_UNAUTH: Session expired. Please sign in again.
cloud.studentSubfolderError_FORBIDDEN: You’re not allowed to do this.
cloud.studentSubfolderError_INVALID_PARENT_FOL: The subfolder must be created under Student documents.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.subtitle: Students, teachers and leadership — filters under “New conversation” help you pick someone quickly.
messaging.newDialogHint: Under Students you’ll see every learner; gray rows don’t have an activated login yet (you can’t open a DM until their account is linked). Narrow with the chips or search.
messaging.newDialogSearchPlaceholder: Type a name or class to filter…
messaging.newDialogEmptySegment: No one in this category yet.
messaging.newDialogPickTwoForGroup: Tick at least two people for a group (besides you).
messaging.newDialogGroupNameRequired: Give the group a name (e.g. Sports project 2026).
messaging.unreadCountAria: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}
messaging.readByAria: People who have seen this message
messaging.groupParticipantsButtonAria: View participants and manage the group
messaging.groupNoOneToAdd: Nobody else available from your directory.
messaging.groupAdminOnlyNotice: Only the designated group admin can add or remove members.
messaging.groupRemoveConfirmDescription: {name} will lose access to this conversation.
messaging.groupMakeAdminConfirmDescription: {name} will become the only group admin. You will lose admin rights but stay in the group.

errors.FORBIDDEN: Messaging is not available for this account.
errors.NO_DB: Cannot reach the server. Please try again later.
errors.GROUP_MIN_TWO_OTHERS: For a group, pick at least two other people.
errors.NOT_PARTICIPANT: You are not in this conversation.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: Attachments must be at most 10 MB.
errors.ATTACH_UPLOAD_FAILED: Could not upload the file. Please try again.
errors.NO_SERVICE_ROLE: Attachments need a technical configuration (contact your admin).
errors.NOT_GROUP: This conversation is not a group.
errors.NOT_GROUP_ADMIN: Only the group admin can perform this action.
errors.ALREADY_PARTICIPANT: This person is already in the group.
errors.TARGET_NOT_PARTICIPANT: That person is not in the group.
errors.GROUP_MIN_TWO_PARTICIPANTS: Two people must stay in this conversation.
errors.NEW_ADMIN_NOT_PARTICIPANT: The new admin must already be in the group.
errors.CANT_REMOVE_GROUP_ADMIN_BEFORE_TRANSFER: Transfer admin rights before removing this person.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Live rows from Supabase — your personal reminders stay private.
calendar.privacyHint: Items you create with « My personal agenda » stay visible only to you. Institutional items from leadership use a contrasting left accent bar.
calendar.placeholderGrid: « {view} » grid preview — full scheduling widgets come later; authoritative list is below.
calendar.detailHintEditable: Updating a school-wide slot changes it for anyone who sees it.
calendar.detailHintReadonly: Read-only — you can only edit your personal items, or institutional items when you are staff admin.
calendar.datesRequiredToast: Provide both start and end date/time.
calendar.toastDatesInvalid: The submitted dates could not be read.
calendar.listDesc: The next three upcoming items for the filter you chose (personal vs school-wide).
calendar.emptyList: No items for this filter yet — add something personal or ask leadership to publish.
calendar.personalDialogHint: Only you will ever see these entries.
calendar.toastNoService: Supabase server role missing — cannot save.

classes.title: Classes
classes.heroLead: Each card is one class: headcount, follow-up and files in the cloud.
classes.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No classes listed yet.} one {# class tracked here.} other {# classes tracked here.}}
classes.studentsCountShort: {count, plural, =0 {No students} one {# student} other {# students}}
classes.activeSanctionsShort: {count, plural, =0 {No active sanction} one {# active sanction} other {# active sanctions}}
classes.emptyList: Classes are created under Administration. If something looks missing, contact your leadership team.
classes.studentsListHint: Pick a learner to open their student profile.
classes.noStudents: No students linked to this class yet.
classes.filesBlurbShort: Files you can access in the cloud.
classes.filesExplain: This class's shared materials live in the cloud.
classes.sanctionsFeedDescShort: Latest entries — full detail remains on each student page.
classes.sanctionsPreviewEmpty: Nothing to show: no entries on file yet.

student.title: {first} {last}
student.sanctionsHistoryHint: Active and withdrawn entries — read-only overview for teachers.
student.sanctionsEmpty: No disciplinary entries on file for this learner.
student.sectionReportSanctionDesc: Record an incident or sanction. Professors can read the rest of the dossier but cannot edit those sections.

disciplineShortcut.title: New warning or disciplinary entry
disciplineShortcut.description: Saved to the student profile discipline history (same records as on the full student page).
disciplineShortcut.classBulkHint: One identical entry will be created for every student in the class (same type and text).
disciplineShortcut.errorGeneric: Could not save. Check the form and try again.

sanctions.pdfSent: Official PDF emailing hooks into Resend for the director inbox.

admin.title: Administration

teacherDocuments.pageSubtitle: Define default paperwork for new hires, track submissions, and approve full app access.
teacherDocuments.catalogEmpty: No document types yet. Add one or use the sample button.
teacherDocuments.teacherPanelHint: Add items from the catalog or with a custom label (while access is not yet approved).
teacherDocuments.noPendingDesc: New hires will show up here until their access is approved.
teacherDocuments.noApprovedDesc: Approved teachers appear here (you can revoke approval anytime).
teacherDocuments.approveConfirm: Approve full access for this teacher?
teacherDocuments.revokeConfirm: Revoke approval and block full access?

pedago.pageSubtitle: Separate access from teachers: the person chooses their password on first sign-in from the login page — « First-time sign-in » tab, using the email you enter here.
pedago.deleteDesc: The profile and login will be removed. Existing data may remain depending on setup.
pedago.errEmailInUse: This email is already in use.

admin.orgHint: Drag roles to update display order (saved in Supabase).
admin.rolesReorderBlurb: {count, plural, =0 {No permissions enabled} one {{count} active permission} other {{count} active permissions}} — stored in database
admin.rolesEmpty: No custom roles in the database yet. Add rows to the "custom_roles" table or import seed data.
admin.subtitle: Tooling strictly for school leadership.

leadForms.pageSubtitle: Review submissions from the public site: call back, approve, or delete once processed.
leadForms.tabPendingAria: {count, plural, one {# pending request} other {# pending requests}}
leadForms.deleteDescription: The row will be permanently removed from the database. This cannot be undone.
leadForms.fieldSource: How did you hear about us?
leadForms.toastError: Action failed. Retry or check permissions.
leadForms.searchEmptyDesc: No request matches your search or the selected filters.

sanctionsHub.pageSubtitle: Every sanction still marked active across all students. Rows created since your last hub visit stay highlighted until you leave this page.
sanctionsHub.pageSubtitlePrincipal: Active sanctions for students in classes where you are head teacher, including entries added by other teachers.
sanctionsHub.weekBanner: {count, plural, one {# sanction added in the last 7 days.} other {# sanctions added in the last 7 days.}}
sanctionsHub.retireDesc: It will remain in history as retired.
sanctionsHub.deleteDesc: Director only: this row is removed from the database.
sanctionsHub.toastNewSanctions: {count, plural, one {# new active sanction since your last visit.} other {# new active sanctions since your last visit.}}

classManage.listSubtitle: Create classes, edit name and description, and browse students. The head teacher is linked from each teacher’s admin profile (Accounts). Deleting a class keeps students in the database but clears their class. Files linked to the class are detached.
classManage.createHint: Then assign the head teacher under Administration → Accounts, on that staff member’s profile.
classManage.academicYearHelp: This range appears under the class name (e.g. 2027–2030).
classManage.studentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No students} one {1 student} other {# students}}
classManage.emptyList: No classes yet. Use "New class" to add one.
classManage.formSectionSubtitle: Edit general details and browse students in this class.
classManage.principalDetailBlurb: To assign or change the head teacher: Administration → Accounts → open the teacher → classes where they are head teacher.
classManage.noStudents: No students are assigned to this class yet.
classManage.deleteWarn: Students remain in the database without a class. All documents in this class cloud space will be permanently deleted (storage included). Class folders are removed with the class. This cannot be undone.
classManage.errorInvalidPrincipal: This person cannot be head teacher for a class.
classManage.errorAcademicYears: Start year must be before or equal to the end year.
classManage.cloudSectionSubtitle: Create, rename and order subfolders (director only). Staff pick a destination when uploading.

cloudFolders.heading: Folder tree
cloudFolders.hint: Drag handles to reorder folders at the same level. Click a name to rename.
cloudFolders.empty: No subfolders yet. Use the button below to add one at the root.
cloudFolders.deleteConfirmDesc: “{name}” will be removed from the tree. Existing files stay available but will no longer be filed under this folder.
cloudFolders.deleteConfirmDescWithChildren: “{name}” and all subfolders under it ({count} total in this branch) will be deleted. Existing files stay available but lose this filing.

errors.systemFolder: This system folder (“Student documents”) cannot be renamed or deleted.

presets.saveDescription: System folders are not included. Presets are stored in this browser only.
presets.saveEmptyTree: There are no custom folders to save (system folders are skipped).
presets.applyDescription: Missing folders are created with the same names and nesting. Existing folders with the same name at the same level are reused.
presets.applyEmpty: No presets in this browser yet. Use “Save folder layout” on a class that already has folders.
presets.applySuccess: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing new — everything already existed.} one {# folder created.} other {# folders created.}}

hub.title: Administration
hub.subtitle: Teacher and student accounts, classes.
hub.studentsDesc: Student records: identity, class, birth information.
hub.announcementsDesc: Create a message with a preset icon for targeted dashboards.
hub.calendarDesc: Publish slots for all staff, head teachers only, or hand-picked cohorts.
hub.sanctionsHubDesc: Consolidated view — {activeCount, plural, =0 {no active sanction.} one {# active sanction.} other {# active sanctions.}}
hub.historyDesc: Everything happening on Sporformation: uploads, deletions, messages, sign-ins…
hub.leadFormsDesc: Applications and employer leads from the public site (call tracking).
hub.pedagoDesc: Marketing-site logins: control app and hub access without mixing them with teachers.
hub.teacherDocsDesc: Catalog of required files and tracking for new teacher onboarding.

history.title: School history
history.subtitle: A complete, readable feed of what happens on Sporformation: who uploads, who edits, who deletes, who sends a message — and who signs in for the very first time.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search a name, a file, a message…
history.emptyDesc: No event matches the current filters.
history.eventCount: {count, plural, =0 {no events} one {# event} other {# events}}

action.AUTH_SIGN_IN_FIRST: signed in for the first time ✨
action.FOLDER_TEMPLATE_APPLIED: applied a folder template to the class
action.STAFF_MARKED_LEFT: marked a teacher as having left
action.STAFF_PASSWORD_RESET_BY_ADMIN: reset the password of an account
action.SANCTION_REPORTS_CREATED: filed discipline reports for the class
action.TEACHER_DOC_REQUEST_ADDED: added a required document for a teacher
action.TEACHER_ONBOARDING_APPROVED: approved full app access after onboarding
action.TEACHER_ONBOARDING_BUNDLE_RESET: reset the onboarding bundle submission status

calendarSchool.pageSubtitle: Publish shared slots and skim every non-personal item leadership has queued.
calendarSchool.plannerBoardDesc: All non-personal rows created here; real recipients still follow the visibility you configured when publishing.
calendarSchool.publishDialogHint: After publishing the slot enters the institutional calendar timeline for whoever matches your audience.
calendarSchool.toastDatesRequired: Provide both start and end date/time.
calendarSchool.toastDatesInvalid: The submitted dates could not be read.
calendarSchool.toastTargetsPersistFailed: Recipients could not be saved. Try again or contact support.
calendarSchool.formDesc: Timebox first, choose an audience preset, or enable precise selectors below.
calendarSchool.toastTargetsRequired: Pick at least one teacher, class, or student when using precise targeting.

audHint.CLASSROOM_TEACHERS: Classroom-facing staff; not admin desks alone.
audHint.SPECIFIC_TARGETS: Combine selectors — any tick creates visibility.

students.listSubtitle: Add students and complete their records. Each profile summarizes class, head teacher and discipline counters; open the full student page for sanction details.
students.bulkDeleteSelectedHint: {count, plural, =0 {None selected} one {# student selected} other {# students selected}}
students.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription: You are about to delete {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}} and related data (sanctions, etc.). Linked login accounts will also be removed. This cannot be undone.
students.bulkDeleteSuccess: {count, plural, one {# student deleted.} other {# students deleted.}}
students.bulkDeleteErrorForbidden: Only the director can delete students.
students.bulkDeleteErrorNotFound: None of these students were found.
students.bulkDeleteAuthPartial: {count, plural, one {Records were removed, but # login account is still active: check Supabase Auth or retry.} other {Records were removed, but # login accounts are still active: check Supabase Auth or retry.}}
students.deleteStudentConfirmDescription: Their data will be removed and their login account disabled. This cannot be undone.
students.deleteStudentAuthPartial: Records were removed, but the login account could not be deleted automatically. Check Supabase Auth.
students.importTitle: Import students from an Excel file
students.importHint: Pick the target class and the .xlsx file. No student is created until you confirm the preview.
students.importFileHint: 10 MB max. Sheet “Liste promo” is used if present, otherwise the first sheet.
students.importPreviewHint: Review the list below, then confirm the import.
students.importDuplicatesHint: For each duplicate, choose whether to keep the existing student or to replace it with the data from the Excel file. No duplicate is ever created.
students.importDupReasonName: same last + first name in this class
students.importResolveSummary: To create: {toCreate} — To replace: {toReplace} — To skip: {toSkip}.
students.importDoneHint: Imported students are now visible in the list and in the chosen class.
students.importErrorForbidden: You don’t have permission to import students.
students.importErrorNoServiceRole: Server configuration is incomplete: Supabase service role is missing.
students.importErrorParseFailed: Unable to read this file (unsupported format).
students.importErrorMissingNameColumns: Columns “Nom” and “Prénom” are missing in the sheet.
students.extHint: All fields are optional and free text. They appear on the student profile.
students.createHint: First and last name are required. Class, email and birth details are optional.
students.ageYears: {age, plural, =0 {—} one {# year old} other {# years old}}
students.overviewDisciplineHint: Counts from the sanctions table (total includes every recorded type).
students.overviewIdentityHint: Read-only summary. Use “Edit record” to update these fields.
students.editDossierDialogHint: Changes are saved to Supabase and reflected on this page after you submit.
students.emptyList: No students yet. Use “New student” to add one.
students.errorNameRequired: First and last name are required.
students.sanctionsLater: A sanctions summary will appear here in a future version. For now, open the full student profile.

publishAnnouncement.pageSubtitle: Messages and badges appear on each dashboard according to targeting.

whoSees.ALL_STAFF: Directors and administrators, head teachers, teachers and students.
whoSees.CLASSROOM_TEACHERS: Head teachers and classroom teachers only (not admin-only desks, not students).

publishAnnouncement.formSubtitle: Title, body, icon and color ; pick who may read it.
publishAnnouncement.descPlaceholder: Plain text, escaped for safety. Blank line begins a new paragraph.
publishAnnouncement.accentHint: Card tint on the dashboard and Announcements page.

audHint.ALL_STAFF: Visible to everyone: leadership, head teachers, teachers and students.

publishAnnouncement.errorService: Missing Supabase service-role key on the server.
publishAnnouncement.errorInsert: The database rejected the insert (missing columns?). Run the « announcements » SQL migrations in Supabase, then try again.

logs.title: Activity log
logs.subtitle: Server-recorded events (director only).
logs.emptyDesc: Sensitive actions will appear here once server actions write to the log table.

accounts.listSubtitle: Manage profiles, passwords and departures (Supabase Auth + service role for sensitive operations).
accounts.listSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, role, or subject…
accounts.manageCardHint: Changes visibility follows your access rules.
accounts.createModalHint: Save the record with their work email: active or new teachers must then use « First-time sign-in » on the login page with that same address to choose their password.
accounts.employmentHelp: Without an initial password, active or new staff create their account from the login page (« First-time sign-in »). Former accounts are suspended and stay for records.
accounts.joinedAtHelp: Start date or appointment date for the profile and exports.
accounts.errorLeftDateRequired: Enter an end date for a former teacher.
accounts.errorMissingRequired: First name, last name, and email are required.
accounts.errorInvalidEmail: The email address is not valid.
accounts.errorEmailAlreadyInApp: This email already belongs to an account listed in the app (existing profile).
accounts.errorEmailAuthExists: This email already exists in Supabase Auth without an app profile. Remove or merge it in the Auth dashboard, or use another address.
accounts.errorAuthUserLookup: The email exists in authentication but could not be linked automatically. Contact technical support or check Supabase Auth.
accounts.principalClassesLabel: Classes where they are head teacher
accounts.principalClassesHelp: You can pick several. For each class, any previous head teacher is unassigned from that class automatically.
accounts.principalClassesEmpty: No classes in the database. Create classes in administration before assigning a head teacher.
accounts.assignedClassesHelp: Optional — one or more classes where this teacher works. Separate from the head-teacher role (see above when role is « Head teacher »).
accounts.assignedClassesEmpty: No classes in the database. Create classes in administration before assigning teaching classes.
accounts.errorPrincipalClassesRequired: Select at least one class for a head teacher.
accounts.errorInvalidPrincipalClasses: One or more selected classes are invalid or could not be found.
accounts.errorInvalidAssignedClasses: One or more assigned teaching classes are invalid or could not be found.
accounts.createdPendingSignupToast: Invitation saved: the teacher must complete « First-time sign-in » on the login page with the same email.
accounts.createdLinkedExistingAuthToast: Profile created: an auth account already existed for this email; the record was linked.
accounts.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
accounts.leaveEstablishmentHint: The account can no longer sign in; document metadata stays in the database. Set the end date.
accounts.invitePendingHint: Invitation on file — their account activates when they use « First-time sign-in » on the login page with this email.
accounts.inviteRevokeDialogBody: This person will no longer be able to use « First-time sign-in » with this email until you add them again. No sign-in account exists for them yet.
accounts.inviteRevokeNotFound: Invitation not found (already revoked or account was created in the meantime).
accounts.listCardOpenHint: Click to open the full record
accounts.deleteWarnDocs: All file records (metadata) owned by this teacher will be deleted.
accounts.deleteWarnStorage: Corresponding objects will be removed from the storage bucket ("documents").
accounts.deleteConfirmCheckbox: I understand documents will be removed.
accounts.deleteDialogBody: Files and metadata will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
accounts.directorRoleLocked: Another director’s role cannot be changed here.
accounts.errorNoServiceRole: Missing "SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" in .env.local — required to create or delete accounts.
accounts.errorNoSelf: You cannot perform this action on your own account.
accounts.errorCantPromoteDirector: You cannot promote another user to director from this screen.
accounts.errorDemoteSelf: You cannot remove your own director role.
accounts.errorGeneric: Operation failed. Check the data or Supabase configuration.
accounts.errorInvalidRole: This role is not allowed for your account or from this screen.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, security, appearance, language, and privacy.
settings.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow your device. Your choice is saved on this device.
settings.profileDesc: Information shown according to your privacy preferences.

avatar.label: Profile photo
avatar.hint: Shown in messaging and wherever the app displays your avatar.
avatar.dialogDesc: Pick an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF).
